name: ai-agent-sdk
description: Build autonomous AI agents for the Zero-Employee Enterprise (ZEE). Create intelligent, context-aware agents with unprecedented ease and functionality.

commit.message:
chore: update package dependencies and add overrides (#93)

* chore: update package dependencies and add overrides

- Added "form-data" override in package.json to version ^4.0.4.
- Updated "form-data" to version 4.0.5 in pnpm-lock.yaml and package-lock.json.
- Added new dependencies: "es-set-tostringtag" and "hasown" with respective versions in package-lock.json for both templates.
- Updated "jsondiffpatch" to version 0.7.3 in pnpm-lock.yaml and package-lock.json for both templates.

* fix: sync package.json overrides with pnpm-lock.yaml

Updated package.json to include both form-data and jsondiffpatch overrides
to match the versions in pnpm-lock.yaml, fixing CI validation error.

chore: update package dependencies and add overrides (#93)

* chore: update package dependencies and add overrides

- Added "form-data" override in package.json to version ^4.0.4.
- Updated "form-data" to version 4.0.5 in pnpm-lock.yaml and package-lock.json.
- Added new dependencies: "es-set-tostringtag" and "hasown" with respective versions in package-lock.json for both templates.
- Updated "jsondiffpatch" to version 0.7.3 in pnpm-lock.yaml and package-lock.json for both templates.

* fix: sync package.json overrides with pnpm-lock.yaml

Updated package.json to include both form-data and jsondiffpatch overrides
to match the versions in pnpm-lock.yaml, fixing CI validation error.

releases.name: v0.2.6
releases.body:
## What's Changed
* update docs by @gane5h in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/36
* Proper way to get the ZeeWorkflow to run by @shovon in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/38
* a couple of fixes to docs by @rogarcia in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/41
* Package.json: run -> dev by @shovon in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/39
* Hard code the Covalent AI Agent SDK in the template's package.json by @shovon in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/37
* feat: Add historical token tool by @karanpargal in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/42
* add o3-mini by @gane5h in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/45
* fix/chore: Export GR Tools | Docs for Historical token prices by @karanpargal in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/47
* doc: fix documentation by @vivianjeng in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/48
* Optional parameter by @shovon in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/44
* Bump 0.2.2 by @shovon in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/50
* fix: zee workflow arg passing by @jagnani73 in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/55
* v0.2.3 by @jagnani73 in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/56
* Yj-feat/multimodal-support by @jagnani73 in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/54
* feat: Add dynamic zee maxIterations by @gane5h in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/58
* Add temperature to model config by @The18thWarrior in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/59
* Bump 0.2.4 by @shovon in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/60
* Tool Calling Fix and Gemini WIP by @jagnani73 in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/61
* v0.2.5 by @jagnani73 in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/62
* Have README.md be deleted upon publishing by @shovon in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/65
* Remove all instances of any by @shovon in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/64
* add endgame agent by @gane5h in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/67
* feat: API Key Mask | Update 001 Template by @karanpargal in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/70
* feat: Add Onchain workflow template by @karanpargal in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/66
* Bump 0.2.6 by @shovon in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/72

## New Contributors
* @rogarcia made their first contribution in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/41
* @vivianjeng made their first contribution in https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/pull/48

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/covalenthq/ai-agent-sdk/compare/v0.2.0...v0.2.6

readme_html:
AI Agent SDK for TypeScript

📖 Documentation | ✍🏻 ZEE Use-cases

Features

  • LLMs - a unified interface for all LLMs
  • Agents - a single model with a system prompt and a set of tools
  • Tools - extend the capabilities of agents with external tools
  • ZEE Workflows - compose agents to solve complex problems

Using the SDK (Quick Start)

1. Start with a template

npx @covalenthq/create-zee-app@latest

This will create a new project with a basic setup.

2. Modify the agent

const agent1 = new Agent({
    name: "Agent1",
    model: {
        provider: "OPEN_AI",
        id: "gpt-4o-mini",
    },
    description: "A helpful AI assistant that can engage in conversation.",
    instructions: ["Interact with the user in a friendly and helpful manner"],
});

3. Modify the ZEE Workflow

const zee = new ZeeWorkflow({
    goal: "A workflow of agents that do stuff together",
    agents: [agent1, agent2],
    model: {
        provider: "OPEN_AI",
        id: "gpt-4o-mini",
    },
});

4. Run the Zee Workflow

(async function main() {
    const result = await zee.run();
    console.log(result);
})();

🤝 Contributing

Contributions, issues and feature requests are welcome! Feel free to check issues page.

Or join the AI Agent SDK Working Group to get help and discuss the future of the SDK.

Show your support

Give a ⭐️ if this project helped you!

📝 License

This project is MIT licensed.
